title: 1.1: Tests that mouse selection correctly selects text on a single line when performing single line click
1.2: Tests that mouse selection correctly selects text across multiple lines when dragging vertically
1.3: Tests that word selection with drag extends the selection word by word when double-clicking and dragging
1.4: Tests that line selection with drag extends the selection line by line when triple-clicking and dragging
1.5: Tests that rectangle selection selects a rectangular block of text when modifier keys are held
1.6: Tests that selection updates when scrolling during an active selection
1.7: Tests that existing selections can be extended using right-click
1.8: Tests that `actions_for_url`returns matching actions when URL protocol matches the protocol criteria in the spec
1.9: Tests that actions_for_url returns matching actions when file MIME type matches the mime criteria in the spec
1.10: Tests that `actions_for_url` returns matching actions when file extension matches the ext criteria in the spec
1.11: Tests that actions_for_url expands environment variables when action commands contain $VARIABLE syntax
1.12: Tests that configuration parsing handles font_size when configuration contains font settings
1.13: Tests that configuration parsing creates keyboard mappings when configuration contains map directives
1.14: Tests that configuration parsing creates mouse mappings when configuration contains mouse_map directives
1.15: Tests that configuration parsing resolves action aliases when configuration contains action_alias directives
1.16: Tests that configuration parsing expands environment variables when env directives reference previously defined variables
1.17: Tests that configuration parsing joins split lines when configuration uses backslash line continuation
2.1: Places the test for mouse selection functionality in kitty_tests/mouse.py
2.2: Places the test for open action parsing in kitty_tests/open_actions.py
2.3: Places the test for configuration file parsing in kitty_tests/options.py
3.1: All tests use the unittest framework by inheriting from BaseTest class
3.2: All tests follow the test naming pattern test_<functionality>
4.1: Follows the pattern of using @contextmanager to set up controlled environment variables like $EDITOR, $URL, etc. for testing open actions
